script.arcTitle: Jordan v Argentina: A Fightback and Final Answer
script.openingLine: Welcome to Replay: Jordan meet Argentina in Group J at Dallas Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: Jordan meet Argentina in Group J at Dallas Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with this Group J meeting from the World Cup group stage.

moments.spokenLine: MOHANNAD ABUTAHA is shown a card for Jordan.
moments.explainer: The first verified disciplinary moment belongs to Jordan.

moments.spokenLine: Giovani LO CELSO scores, and Argentina lead Jordan 0–1.
moments.explainer: Argentina take the lead through Giovani LO CELSO.

moments.spokenLine: Lautaro MARTINEZ scores, and Argentina now lead Jordan 0–2.
moments.explainer: Argentina extend their advantage before half-time.

moments.spokenLine: Jordan trail Argentina 0–2 at the interval.
moments.explainer: The half-time score gives Argentina a clear advantage.

moments.spokenLine: MOUSA ALTAMARI scores, and Jordan pull back to 1–2.
moments.explainer: Jordan reduce the deficit and move back within one goal.

moments.spokenLine: YAZAN ALARAB is shown a card for Jordan.
moments.explainer: Jordan receive another verified card as the match continues.

moments.spokenLine: Lionel MESSI scores, and Argentina lead Jordan 1–3.
moments.explainer: Argentina restore a two-goal advantage through Lionel MESSI.

moments.spokenLine: MOHAMMAD ABUZRAIQ is shown a card for Jordan.
moments.explainer: Jordan receive a further card late in the match.

moments.spokenLine: Jordan 1–3 Argentina. That is full time.
moments.explainer: Argentina finish with the verified 1–3 victory.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Jordan meet Argentina in Group J at Dallas Stadium.
In the 17th minute, MOHANNAD ABUTAHA is shown a card for Jordan.
In the 19th minute, Giovani LO CELSO scores, and Argentina lead Jordan 0–1.
In the 31st minute, Lautaro MARTINEZ scores, and Argentina now lead Jordan 0–2.
In the 55th minute, MOUSA ALTAMARI scores, and Jordan pull back to 1–2.
In the 64th minute, YAZAN ALARAB is shown a card for Jordan.
In the 80th minute, Lionel MESSI scores, and Argentina lead Jordan 1–3.
In the 4th minute of second-half stoppage time, MOHAMMAD ABUZRAIQ is shown a card for Jordan.
